        print(f"  ({cr},{cc}) color={n['color']}")

# Check orange object

        cc = sum(b[1] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  ({cr},{cc}) color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check purple objects

for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] > 5:
        cr = sum(b[0] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(b[1] for b in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  ({cr},{cc}) color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
